title: A Busy Restaurant
content: On Friday night, the restaurant where Mia worked became extremely busy. Customers filled every table, and waiters moved quickly between the kitchen and dining area. Mia carried plates carefully while trying not to forget any orders. The smell of fresh pasta and grilled meat filled the air. Even though the work was stressful, Mia liked the energy of busy evenings. Near the end of her shift, a customer thanked her for the excellent service. That small compliment made her smile despite her tired feet.
